chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-232 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 11.05.2026 Mr.Muhammad Saleem Laghari, Advocate for applicants Mr.Shahid Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State ********* The report received from the S.S.P Jamshoro, is taken on record. Mr.Asif Gul Bhatti, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. This Criminal Misc: Application has been filed by two applicants out of whom namely Farooque Hussain (one of the proposed accused No.2) is the blood brother of the complainant/respondent No.3 Mst.Naila Ayaz. Farooque Hussain and co-applicant Sheeraz Ali (proposed accused No.1) are aggrieved by the impugned order dated 27.04.2026, passed by the Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Jamshoro. Heard learned counsel for the applicant, respondent No.3, as well as the learned Additional P.G. The scope of powers exercised by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is limited. The impugned order dated 27.04.2026 has been passed based on material available on record. The forum of the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is not empowered to conduct either an inquiry or an investigation. I do not find any ground to interfere with the impugned order except that it directs registration of FIR prior to recording of statement of the complainant, while mere recording of a statement does not amount to the definite lodgment of an FIR (2024 SCMR 985; 2024 SCMR 1123); however, insofar as the direction for registration of an FIR against the proposed accused is concerned, such a matter squarely falls within the domain of the police authority.

The forum of the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace is not empowered to conduct either an inquiry or an investigation. I do not find any ground to interfere with the impugned order except that it directs registration of FIR prior to recording of statement of the complainant, while mere recording of a statement does not amount to the definite lodgment of an FIR (2024 SCMR 985; 2024 SCMR 1123); however, insofar as the direction for registration of an FIR against the proposed accused is concerned, such a matter squarely falls within the domain of the police authority. To this extent i.e, the direction for registration of FIR in the impugned order is contrary to law. Accordingly, the impugned order is set aside. The 2 of 2 police authority is directed to record the statement of respondent No.3 and act in accordance with law. Given the above, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
